name: Life Ops
summary: A local-first operating system for important human data and action loops.
whyNow: The project is ready to share with a few high-context collaborators.
highlights: Normalizes inbox, calendar, records, and routines into one action layer.
Lets an agent draft structured outreach and keep follow-up loops alive.
proofPoints: Local-first personal ops system already running against real Gmail, calendar, X, and Emma data.
asks: If it resonates, I would love a short reaction and one obvious next intro.
